title: BOB Notification 2026 - Apply Online for 5000 Apprentice Posts
description: The Bank of Baroda (BOB) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 5000 Apprentice Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their Any Degree can apply for the BOB Notification 2026 . The interested applicants can apply in online mode. Here we have mentioned the education details, age limit, selection process, application fee, salary, and how to apply f...
